title: Tax' Ocean Villager
description: Ocean Villager is a Minecraft modification aims to add ships with villagers.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/f83770fdc767200e66f53d56b965ccb5f6229357.png)

Thanks to my friend and Co-Author Leon. Check his awesome videos on Youtube.

First showcase.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MR68YK--0PY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Overview:
Ocean Villager is a Minecraft Fabric and Forge modification aims to add ships with inhabitants.

![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/0da8cc1287eac13ee874686b536e6d989b2989a4.png)

Feature:
Marine and Pirate Equipment.

![02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/0fffe2b294c1bef06ca16b4049e8a7a465f194e5.png)

Marine:
A Captain and a Sailer with custom trades. The ships are naturally spawning in the ocean biome.

![03](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/0da8cc1287eac13ee874686b536e6d989b2989a4.png)

Pirate:
A Pirate with his Crew.

![04](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/9740d4dc65dc3b2ba45ccf2d2cd8b07da8d70f5e.png)

Variant:
Zombified version of the Marine and Pirate ships. The inhabitans are zombified and dangerous.

![05](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/2177e19f2ee0ad3f871e11167a3e875c87a1931d.png) 

Boss:
Witchship with Witches.

![06](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/ede7503d6deefef49e56c8a52c54c171fabc052a.png) 

Structure:
Lighttower with an Ocean Trader spawns on the beaches. Check the Ocean Villager Trader mod.

![07](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/3ab352d380ea5dc01a2350ea46b8e7a5b8fd8110.png) 

Armor:
Full Turtle Armor tradet by the Ocean Trader.

![08](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/294e3e22263f71b64d64606198957c5563015f0e.png)

Item:
Creative items for spawning the Ships. Marine and Pirate equipment and unique music.

![09](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/d7cb404faa7e75833fdc03b8a19b20e4a9293b41.png)

Extra:
Custom Paintings includet.

![10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/6a6c73b62c9ad4af465b2f00cb7b0af0f53bc796.png)

Integration:
Built-In compatibility with Recruits mod.

![11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/c16005f36249419f40213606ff92aecba78342c0.png)

Integration:
Built-in compatibility with Fresh Animations.

![12](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/eba57664fbfa3ed1c4c659be926e338f4c02901a.png)

Credit:
Written by Taknax.

![13](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/ef186d389a9df85bbb225a963477bb0a26dbe11e.png)
